new.startNewConfirmBody: Your current answers will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
new.hasDraftBody: Would you like to continue it or start a new one?

name.title: What should we call you?
name.helper: Enter your first name or business name.

product.title: What product or service do you sell?
product.helper: Describe what you offer in a few words.
product.placeholder: e.g. Homemade pickles, Tailoring services, Mobile repair

usp.title: What makes it special?
usp.helper: What do customers love about it? What's different?
usp.placeholder: e.g. Made fresh every day, 10 years of experience, same-day delivery

price.title: What is the price?
price.helper: Write it naturally — ₹500, from ₹299, depends on service, etc.

offer.title: Is there an offer right now?
offer.helper: Any discount, deal, or free gift? Leave blank if there's no offer.
offer.placeholder: e.g. 20% off this week, Buy 2 get 1 free

buyer.title: Who usually buys it?
buyer.placeholder: e.g. Working women, College students, Local families

location.title: Where do you sell?
location.helper: Your city, area, or online — wherever you reach customers.

occasion.title: Is there an occasion?
occasion.helper: Is this for a festival, season, or just regular business?

goal.title: What do you want this campaign to help with?
goal.helper: Pick what matters most right now.

options.announce_launch: Announce a new product or service

photo.title: Do you have a product photo?
photo.helper: A photo can make your campaign more personal.
photo.unavailableHelper: We'll add your photo to campaigns in an upcoming update.

outputLanguage.heading: Almost ready!
outputLanguage.subheading: Choose the language for your marketing content.

generating.takesAMinute: This usually takes less than a minute.

result.heading: Campaign ready
result.subheading: Your marketing content is ready to use.

instagram.label: Instagram Caption
instagram.connectNote: You can still copy and post manually.

partialSuccess.imageFailed: Image could not be generated, but your text content is ready.

result.notSaved: This campaign was generated but couldn't be saved. Your draft is preserved.
result.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically. Press and hold the text to copy it.

error.timeout: This is taking longer than expected.
